nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for drafting
nodes.label_negative: AI as independent executor without iteration
nodes.grounding_span: I gave basics. It fleshed it out, reworded and reformatted. I asked it to add this or that, or make a correction here or there and the draft took shape that way

nodes.label: AI memory and context retention
nodes.grounding_span: I've actually been pleasantly surprised that I don't typically have to re-explain context. Usually, it knows exactly what I'm talking about based on previous conversations

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it told me the building didn't exist and I must be confused and gave me another building that I'd never heard of

nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I don't typically give canned AI responses to correspondence. I like to keep it personal and ensure that I'm authentic
